fingerprint_string: Exclusively orders steel fasteners with zinc-based finishes, mixing metric and imperial threads in moderate to high volumes for diverse industrial applications.
notable_patterns: Shows 100% commitment to steel material across all 18 orders with no other materials ordered
Consistently orders zinc-based finishes (zinc, HDG, yellow zinc, mech zinc) with standard zinc being dominant
Demonstrates balanced usage of both metric (10 orders) and imperial (8 orders) thread systems
Orders complete fastener systems including screws, nuts, washers, and threaded rod suggesting assembly operations
